title: selaginella krugii
intro: Selaginella krugii, also known as Krug's spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It is a type of spikemoss, a group of plants that are often referred to as living fossils due to their ability to thrive in diverse environments. Selaginella krugii has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
